basic_details.job_title: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Guwahati (IIT Guwahati) Project Technician Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iitg.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Guwahati Project Technician Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/science or 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with experience in WASH sector
qualification.details: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with experience in WASH sector. Desirable: office/field experience in Water, Hygiene and Sanitation projects, laboratory assistance/technical support, Documenting Activities/updating scientific documents/reports, editing, proofreading, and revising documents.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.indian_institute_of_technology_roorkee: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/science or 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with experience in WASH sector

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Roorkee Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Bachelor's degree in Engineering/science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with experience in WASH sector. Desirable: office/field experience in Water, Hygiene and Sanitation projects, laboratory assistance/technical support, Documenting Activities/updating scientific documents/reports, editing, proofreading, and revising documents.

content_sections.heading: Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: IIT Roorkee Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The post name for this recruitment is Project Assistant at the Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy available for the Project Assistant position.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in Interview.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 26000 Per Month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates should possess a Bachelor's degree in Engineering/science or a 3-year Diploma in Engineering & Technology with experience in the WASH sector.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any age limit for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Please refer to the official notification for specific age limit details and any applicable relaxations.

faq.question: Q7. When is the Walk-in Interview scheduled?
faq.answer: The Walk-in Interview is scheduled to be held on 10th July 2026.

faq.question: Q8. Where is the venue for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: The venue for the Walk-in Interview is Indian Institute of Technology Roorkee, Roorkee, Uttarakhand - 247667.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the Walk-in Interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, and experience certificates.

faq.question: Q10. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category in this recruitment drive.
